subcodes.first_line: This Wronged One hath borne witness, and doth bear witness, unto the Sovereign of existence and the Lord of the seen and unseen, that [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: این مظلوم گواهی داده و میدهد بسلطان وجود و مالک غیب و شهود و باینکه از برای
subcodes.subjects: @transcendence; unknowability of God, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @Satan; the Evil One, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness
